title: Turkish Minced Lamb Lahmacun
description: A raw-friendly, post-workout Turkish dish featuring biryani masala and a crumbly, fatty texture. Pair with a corn-husk wrap for a nutritious meal after a workout.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine lamb mince, onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, biryani masala, and paprika.
Mash the ingredients together with your hands until well combined.
Let the mixture marinate for 30 minutes at room temperature.
Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Form the mixture into small patties, about 1 inch in diameter.
Cook the patties for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked through.
While the patties are cooking, warm a corn husk in a dry pan over low heat.
To assemble the dish, place a cooked patty in the center of the corn husk and top with a sprinkle of salt and a handful of chopped parsley.
Fold the bottom half of the corn husk over the filling and serve hot.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
